en.title: Best Gaming Chairs 2026
en.description: Tested and ranked gaming chairs across every price point, from the three-media-consensus Secretlab Titan Evo to budget picks that punch well above their price.

zh-tw.title: 最佳電競椅 2026
zh-tw.description: 從三大媒體共識首選 Secretlab Titan Evo 到超值預算款，完整測試排名各價位最值得入手的電競椅。

en.description: The three-media consensus best overall gaming chair, with three sizes that genuinely cover 4'11" to 6'9" and a mechanical 4-way lumbar you dial in precisely.

zh-tw.description: PC Gamer、Tom's Hardware、Tom's Guide 三家媒體一致選為年度最佳，Small 到 XL 三種尺寸涵蓋 150 到 206 公分，機械式四向腰部支撐可精確調整位置與力道。

en.description: A suspension backrest, active forward-leaning alignment, and a 12-year full warranty make this the definitive choice for professionals who sit eight or more hours daily.

zh-tw.description: 懸吊背墊、主動前傾人體工學設計、加上 Herman Miller 認真執行的 12 年零件加工時保固，適合每天坐超過八小時、把椅子當長期投資的使用者。

en.description: The only gaming chair with a dynamic flex frame that adjusts to micro-movements throughout a session, plus a built-in spine stretch function that no other chair on this list offers.

zh-tw.description: 唯一配備動態彈性框架、能跟著坐姿微調的電競椅，內建脊椎延展功能在向後靠時被動延展腰椎，是這個名單裡工程設計最新穎的選擇。

en.description: Razer's premium flagship with a HyperFlex lumbar system adjustable in four directions, 4D armrests, and a 3-year warranty, named the official chair of VALORANT Esports EMEA 2026 and 2027.

zh-tw.description: Razer 旗艦款，四向可調 HyperFlex 腰部支撐系統、四向扶手、三年保固，是 VALORANT 電競 EMEA 賽區 2026 至 2027 年的官方合作椅款。

en.description: A steel-frame mid-range chair developed alongside esports professionals, with cold-foam cushioning, 4D armrests, and 135-degree recline that doubles reliably as an office chair.

zh-tw.description: 與電競職業選手共同開發的鋼架中端椅款，冷膠泡棉椅座、四向扶手、135 度背角調整，是這個名單裡辦公和電競兩用最可靠的中價位選擇。

en.description: A lean-upholstery gaming chair with synchronized tilt and seat depth adjustment for users who want full-back support and deep recline without the bulky bucket-seat aesthetic.

zh-tw.description: 捨棄厚重賽車椅造型的電競椅，同步傾仰機構讓椅背和椅座一起聯動，椅墊深度可調，適合喜歡有支撐感但討厭桶形椅視覺的使用者。

en.description: A $250 chair with 360-degree rotating armrests and synchronized tilt, features that typically appear in chairs costing twice as much, named PC Gamer's best budget pick in March 2026.

zh-tw.description: 台幣八千元就拿到 360 度旋轉扶手和同步傾仰機構，這兩個規格在兩倍價位的椅子才常見，2026 年 3 月被 PC Gamer 選為最佳預算電競椅推薦。

en.description: Razer's accessible mid-range entry with integrated lumbar support and an easier assembly process, delivering solid ergonomic fundamentals for buyers stepping into the Razer ecosystem under $300.

zh-tw.description: Razer 中端入門款，內建腰部支撐、組裝流程比旗艦款簡化，台幣一萬以內就能進入 Razer 人體工學設計路線，是品牌入門選項裡最務實的選擇。

en.description: A wide-seat budget chair with a deliberately relaxed default posture, detachable memory foam neck pillow, and dedicated lumbar support at a price point where most competitors omit both.

zh-tw.description: 寬椅座、預設坐姿偏向放鬆的平價電競椅，在台幣六千五百元這個價位附可拆卸記憶泡棉頸枕和獨立腰枕，是同價位競品少見的配置組合。

en.description: The first gaming chair with fully electric adjustments, seat heating and cooling, an 8-point back massage system, and smart airbag lumbar — a unique category of luxury performance chair at $899.

zh-tw.description: 全電動靠背、扶手調整加上椅座加熱制冷和 8 點按摩系統，在電競椅市場確實是第一個把這些功能整合在同一張椅子裡的設計，9,000 元以下找不到第二張能做到這些的椅子。

references.title: Razer Iskur V2 Named Official Gaming Chair of VALORANT Esports EMEA 2026 & 2027

en.commentary:
The gaming chair market reached a maturity point in 2026 where picking the right seat is about what you value, not about what you can find. Every chair above $300 ships with adjustable lumbar, 4D armrests, and a recline range that covers every sitting posture. The real differentiation happens in three places: how well the chair fits your body type, whether the brand backs it with a serious warranty, and how the ergonomic philosophy aligns with your actual usage hours.

The Secretlab Titan Evo earned its triple-consensus status by solving three things at once. The size range from Small to XL genuinely covers 4'11" to 6'9". The 4-way mechanical lumbar knob lets you dial in position and push force precisely rather than approximate by feel. The 4D armrests offer enough range to clear monitor arms and desk edges without repositioning. At $569, the build quality lands at the threshold where durability becomes real, not just adequate.

The Herman Miller x Logitech G Vantum belongs in a separate conversation. The $995 price buys the 12-year full warranty that Herman Miller treats as a performance guarantee, a suspension backrest that breathes where foam-padded chairs cannot, and a forward-leaning ergonomic position that addresses the posture problem racing-seat gaming chairs create by design. For anyone sitting eight or more hours daily, the Vantum's premium is a justified investment.

LiberNovo's Omni brought the only genuinely new engineering idea to this market in 2026. The dynamic flex frame adjusts to micro-movements throughout a session, and the built-in spine stretch function passively decompresses lumbar vertebrae during recline. These are engineering solutions, not marketing positions.

For the budget tier, the ThunderX3 Solo 360 at $250 delivers 360-degree rotating armrests and synchronized tilt at a price where most competitors still ship fixed armrests. PC Gamer confirmed this position when they added the Solo 360 as their best budget pick in March 2026. The Corsair TC100 Relaxed answers the sub-$200 question with a wider seat and a deliberately relaxed default posture that serves casual and long-session users better than the cramped racing aesthetic of most budget alternatives.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo Is the Correct Answer for Most Buyers
highlights.body: Three major publications landed on the same chair independently. The Titan Evo earns that consensus by solving the body-type problem with a genuine Small-to-XL size system that fits 4'11" to 6'9", delivering a mechanical 4-way lumbar knob with real position and force adjustment, and pairing those fundamentals with 4D armrests that have enough range to clear monitor arms. At $569, the build quality is durably sufficient, not just adequate for the price. This is the chair I recommend without caveats to anyone who asks.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum Is the Right Answer for Long-Hours Workers
highlights.body: The $995 price is a different category of commitment, and the Vantum earns it through things that compound over years. Herman Miller's 12-year warranty covers all parts and labor, which means the company is betting its own cost basis on the chair lasting that long. The suspension backrest delivers airflow that foam-padded chairs physically cannot replicate. The active forward-leaning position the Vantum promotes works against the slumped posture that reclined racing-seat chairs reward. For anyone treating a chair as a back-health investment rather than a gaming accessory, the Vantum is the honest recommendation.

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni Introduced the Only New Engineering Idea in Gaming Chairs This Year
highlights.body: Every other chair on this list adjusts to a set position and holds it. The LiberNovo Omni's dynamic flex frame adjusts continuously to micro-movements throughout a session. The built-in spine stretch function passively decompresses lumbar vertebrae as you recline, addressing the static compression problem that no other gaming chair attempts to solve. At $1,099, the Omni is priced at the top of the market, and the engineering warrants that placement. This is not a repackaged spec list with a new colorway.

highlights.title: ThunderX3 Solo 360 Is the Best Value in the Under-$300 Segment
highlights.body: At $250, the ThunderX3 Solo 360 ships with 360-degree rotating armrests and a synchronized tilt mechanism that moves the seat and backrest together at the correct biomechanical ratio. These features typically appear in chairs at $400 or more. The mesh backrest provides airflow that leatherette budget chairs cannot match. PC Gamer added the Solo 360 as their best budget pick in March 2026, which confirms what the spec sheet and price point already signal. If the budget is under $300, this is the starting point.

highlights.title: Corsair TC100 Relaxed Gets Budget Right by Choosing a Different Design Philosophy
highlights.body: Most budget gaming chairs cut costs by shrinking the seat and hardening the cushion. The Corsair TC100 Relaxed takes a different approach: the seat stays wide, the default posture sits deliberately reclined, and the chair includes a detachable memory foam neck pillow and dedicated lumbar support at $199, where most competitors omit both. That combination makes the TC100 Relaxed the right answer for casual and long-session users who want comfort over racing aesthetics and who find the narrow, upright posture of most budget chairs uncomfortable within an hour.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年電競椅市場進入了一個很清楚的成熟期，問題已經從「哪個牌子好」變成「你需要哪種椅子」。三千元以上的椅子基本上都配備可調腰部支撐、四向扶手、多段背角調整，基礎規格的差距已經縮到很小。真正的差異集中在三個地方：椅子對你身形的適配程度、品牌保固是否認真執行、還有人體工學設計哲學和你實際使用習慣的契合度。

Secretlab Titan Evo 拿到三大媒體共識第一是我認為這個品類最有說服力的結論。Titan Evo 的核心競爭力在於三件事同時做好：Small 到 XL 三種尺寸真的涵蓋 150 到 206 公分的身高範圍；機械式四向腰部支撐可以精確調整位置和推力，而不是放一個軟枕頭讓你自己頂；四向扶手的調整範圍大到可以輕鬆避開顯示器支架。代購約台幣一萬八，這個品質在台灣電競椅市場是非常強的 CP 值定位。

Herman Miller x Logitech G Vantum 是另一個層級的選擇。約台幣三萬二對多數人是很難下手的金額，但這個錢買的是 Herman Miller 認真執行的 12 年零件加工時保固、可以真正透氣的懸吊背墊、還有一個鼓勵你向前坐的人體工學設計，和傳統電競椅後躺賽車式設計完全不同。如果你每天坐超過八小時或長期有腰背困擾，Vantum 的溢價是合理的長期投資。

LiberNovo Omni 帶來的是這一年電競椅市場唯一真正新穎的工程概念。動態彈性框架跟著你的姿勢微調、內建脊椎延展功能在後仰時被動減壓腰椎，是這個名單裡其他選手都沒有嘗試的設計方向。約台幣三萬六偏貴，但工程設計是新的。

預算段我推 ThunderX3 Solo 360。台幣八千元拿到 360 度旋轉扶手和同步傾仰機構，這兩個規格在很多要價兩倍的椅子才看得到，PC Gamer 在 2026 年 3 月把它列為最佳預算推薦確認了這個定位。Corsair TC100 Relaxed 是台幣六千五百元以下的正確解答，寬椅座加上放鬆後仰的預設坐姿，適合長時間輕度使用或追劇用途。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 拿三大媒體共識最佳是有理由的
highlights.body: PC Gamer、Tom's Hardware、Tom's Guide 三家媒體各自測試後選出同一張椅子當年度最佳，這種收斂在電競椅品類裡真的少見。Titan Evo 的說服力在於三件事同時做好：Small 到 XL 涵蓋 150 到 206 公分的身高範圍，機械式四向腰部支撐可以精確調整位置與推力而不是塞個軟枕頭了事，四向扶手的調整範圍大到可以輕鬆繞過顯示器支架和電競桌邊框。代購約台幣一萬八，這個品質在台灣市場是我沒有猶豫直接推薦的定位。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 是每天坐八小時以上的人最誠實的選擇
highlights.body: 約台幣三萬二放在椅子上需要一個理由，Vantum 給出的理由是 Herman Miller 認真執行的 12 年零件加工時保固，這個保固代表品牌對自己的品質有真實信心。懸吊背墊的透氣性是泡棉填充物做不到的，在台灣夏天長時間坐下來的體感差距很明顯。Vantum 鼓勵向前坐的人體工學設計解決的是傳統電競椅後躺賽車式設計帶來的姿勢問題。如果使用情境是遠端工作、長時間直播或長期有腰背問題，Vantum 的溢價是合理的。

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni 帶來這一年唯一真正新穎的電競椅工程設計
highlights.body: 這個名單裡其他椅子都是把你固定在一個設定好的姿勢裡。LiberNovo Omni 的動態彈性框架在一整個使用時段裡持續跟著你的姿勢微調，是完全不同的設計概念。內建脊椎延展功能在向後靠的過程中被動減壓腰椎，解決靜態久坐最難避免的脊椎壓力問題。約台幣三萬六在這個名單裡最高，但工程設計確實是新的東西，這個評分是認真的。

highlights.title: ThunderX3 Solo 360 是三萬以下最被低估的性價比選擇
highlights.body: 台幣八千元拿到 360 度旋轉扶手加同步傾仰機構，同步傾仰讓椅背和椅座以正確的生物力學比例一起聯動，這兩個規格在很多要價一萬五到兩萬的椅子才常見。網狀背墊的透氣性比同價位人造皮革椅好很多，在台灣夏天使用體驗的差距很實際。PC Gamer 在 2026 年 3 月把 Solo 360 列為最佳預算款確認了這個定位。台幣一萬以下不確定要選什麼，Solo 360 是我第一個會建議的選項。

highlights.title: Corsair TC100 Relaxed 用不同設計哲學解決平價椅問題
highlights.body: 多數平價電競椅靠縮小椅座和讓泡棉變硬來壓成本，Corsair TC100 Relaxed 的方向是維持寬椅座、讓預設坐姿角度偏向放鬆而非仿賽車挺立，在台幣六千五百元這個價位附可拆卸記憶泡棉頸枕和獨立腰枕，是同價位競品裡少見的配置組合。適合長時間輕度遊戲、追劇或辦公，坐起來比這個價位應有的感受要好很多。

references.title: Best gaming chair in 2026: I've tested a ton of gaming chairs
Best Gaming Chair in 2026 — these are the top chairs for gamers for the money
Secretlab vs. Herman Miller: Which Has Better Gaming Chairs?

en.commentary:
Secretlab Titan Evo holds rank 1 in April 2026 as the best gaming chair for most buyers, and current reviews consistently return this verdict. The two-knob internal lumbar system — adjusting both height and firmness independently — is the most functional back support implementation in any gaming chair at this price point. Combined with cold-cure foam that doesn't compress over time and genuine build quality that survives daily heavy use, the Titan Evo is the clear practical choice between $400 and $700.

Herman Miller Vantum earns rank 2 for buyers who approach ergonomics seriously and have the budget. The Vantum's PostureFit lumbar support system is designed around active, forward-leaning posture — the position that productive deep-work sessions naturally drift toward. The HM x Logitech G collaboration has made this product line more accessible than pure HM office pricing, which was previously a barrier.

LiberNovo Omni holds rank 3, added as the best high-end gaming chair in March 2026. Its dynamic ergonomic adjustments — the chair adapts to postural shifts rather than locking into a fixed position — represent a different philosophy from both Secretlab and Herman Miller. For long gaming sessions where posture naturally varies, this adaptability has real ergonomic value.

The $399–$700 range continues to offer the best value density in gaming chairs. Above $700, you're buying ergonomics brand reputation more than proportional comfort improvement.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo's Dual-Knob Lumbar System Is the Best in Category
highlights.body: Most gaming chairs offer lumbar support as a fixed cushion or a single-axis adjustment. The Titan Evo's two-knob system adjusts both height and firmness independently, allowing precise targeting of individual lumbar support needs. Combined with cold-cure foam that maintains shape after years of use, this is the most functional back support implementation at this price.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum Is Built for Active Posture, Not Passive Sitting
highlights.body: The Vantum's ergonomic system is designed for forward-leaning, active engagement — the way people actually sit when working or gaming intensely. Its PostureFit support follows the natural curve of the pelvis and lower spine in a way that passive lumbar cushions cannot approximate.

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni's Dynamic Adjustment Addresses Long-Session Fatigue
highlights.body: Sitting in a fixed posture for hours causes fatigue regardless of how good the support is — the problem is static loading. The Omni adapts to postural micro-shifts, distributing load dynamically. For gaming sessions over three hours, this adaptive approach has measurable comfort advantages over fixed-position chairs.

zh-tw.commentary:
Secretlab Titan Evo 在 2026 年四月繼續是電競椅第一名，大多數評測都回歸這個結論。雙旋鈕腰椎系統可以分別調整高度和硬度，這是這個價位電競椅裡最實用的腰椎支撐設計。加上不會隨時間壓縮的冷固化泡綿和能承受日常重度使用的紮實做工，Titan Evo 在 400 到 700 美元的價位是最清楚的實用選擇。

Herman Miller Vantum 第二名，適合認真對待人體工學且有預算的買家。Vantum 的 PostureFit 腰椎系統針對前傾、主動工作的坐姿設計，這正是長時間深度工作或遊戲時自然形成的姿勢。HM x Logitech G 合作讓這個產品線的定價比純 HM 辦公椅更親近。

LiberNovo Omni 第三名，2026 年三月被評為最佳高階電競椅。它的動態人體工學調節讓椅子跟著你的姿勢變化做調整，而不是把你鎖在固定姿勢，這和 Secretlab 及 Herman Miller 的設計哲學都不同。對長時間遊戲中姿勢自然變化的用戶，這種適應性有真實的人體工學價值。

399 到 700 美元這個區間仍然是電競椅性價比最高的範圍，700 美元以上的溢價主要在品牌的人體工學聲譽，不是等比例的舒適度提升。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 雙旋鈕腰椎系統是這個類別的最佳設計
highlights.body: 大多數電競椅的腰椎支撐是固定墊或單軸調節。Titan Evo 的雙旋鈕可以分別調整高度和硬度，精準針對個人腰椎需求。加上多年使用後仍能維持形狀的冷固化泡綿，這是這個價位最實用的腰椎支撐方案。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 是為主動姿勢設計的，不是被動坐姿
highlights.body: Vantum 的人體工學系統針對前傾主動工作的姿勢，也就是人們認真工作或遊戲時自然形成的坐姿。它的 PostureFit 支撐跟隨骨盆和下背的自然曲線，這是被動腰椎墊近似不了的。

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni 的動態調節解決長時間坐姿疲勞
highlights.body: 固定姿勢坐幾個小時本身就會造成疲勞，跟支撐好不好無關，問題是靜態負荷。Omni 隨著你的微小姿勢變化動態調整，分散負荷。遊戲超過三小時的場景，這種適應性設計比固定姿勢的椅子有可量測的舒適優勢。

references.title: Best Gaming Chairs 2026: Tested for Long Sessions
Secretlab Titan Evo 2026 vs Herman Miller Vantum
Best Gaming Chairs of 2026: Expert Rankings

en.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo retains the top spot in April 2026 because it solves the problem that most gaming chairs fail at: long-session comfort. The adjustable lumbar support system, combined with cold foam cushioning that resists compression over years of use, makes it the most consistent choice for 8+ hour desk sessions. The Herman Miller Vantum earns second for users who come from an office chair background — the PostureFit SL spinal support and breathable mesh construction are fundamentally different design philosophies from traditional racing-style chairs, and for buyers who know what Herman Miller quality means, the Vantum delivers it at a gaming-specific price. The Libernovo Omni at three is the strongest challenger in the premium segment with its 4D lumbar pad and hybrid foam-mesh construction.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo's Cold Foam Outlasts Competing Cushions
highlights.body: Most gaming chair foam compresses and flattens within 18-24 months of regular use. Secretlab's cold foam formulation resists this compression measurably, making the long-term comfort investment more durable than competing products at similar price points.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum Is the Office Chair Upgrade Path
highlights.body: If you already own Herman Miller products and understand the brand's ergonomic philosophy, the Vantum delivers that quality standard in a gaming-oriented form factor. The PostureFit SL lumbar support is the best spinal support system in this category.

highlights.title: Libernovo Omni's 4D Lumbar Is the Most Adjustable Support Available
highlights.body: The motorized 4D lumbar pad adjusts in four axes to accommodate a wider range of body types than fixed or 2D systems. For users who have specific lumbar positioning requirements, the Omni offers support precision that the Titan Evo and Vantum do not match.

zh-tw.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo 在 2026 年 4 月繼續排第一，因為它解決了大多數電競椅最核心的問題：長時間坐著舒不舒服。可調式腰靠系統加上不容易塌陷的冷泡棉，8 小時以上的工作或遊戲坐起來是同級產品裡最一致的。Herman Miller Vantum 對從辦公椅換過來的用戶是最好的選擇，PostureFit SL 脊椎支撐和透氣網布的設計理念跟一般賽車椅完全不同，如果你了解 Herman Miller 的品質標準，Vantum 值得這個價格。Libernovo Omni 的電動 4D 腰靠是這個分類調整幅度最大的腰部支撐系統。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 的冷泡棉長期不塌陷
highlights.body: 大多數電競椅的泡棉在使用 1-2 年後就會明顯塌陷，Secretlab 的冷泡棉配方抗壓縮性能明顯更好，長期坐起來的舒適度持久性是同價位最好的。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 是辦公椅用戶的首選
highlights.body: 如果你知道 Herman Miller 的人體工學標準，Vantum 是把這個品質帶進電競環境的最佳選擇。PostureFit SL 脊椎支撐系統是這個分類最好的腰背支撐。

highlights.title: Libernovo Omni 的 4D 腰靠調整幅度最大
highlights.body: 電動 4D 腰靠可以在四個軸向調整，適應更廣泛的體型需求。對腰部支撐有特定位置要求的用戶，Omni 的調整精度是 Titan Evo 和 Vantum 達不到的。

references.title: Best gaming chairs 2026: tested and ranked

en.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo stays at the top of this ranking, and it earns its position through the combination of build quality and ergonomic adjustability that nothing else at its price tier matches. The 9.5 build score reflects premium cold-cure foam that maintains shape after years of use, full metal recline and height mechanisms, and NEO Hybrid Leatherette that proves more durable than genuine leather in heat and humidity. The 4-way adjustable lumbar and neck pillow system adapts to a wider range of body types than fixed-position alternatives. Herman Miller Vantum at #2 brings ergonomic science credentials no gaming brand can claim — the 9.5 ergonomics score is the highest in this list and reflects genuine postural support science that Herman Miller developed over decades. The price premium is the only meaningful downside. Libernovo Omni at #3 is the dynamic seating option — its actuated back support system provides active motion rather than fixed positioning. For users who need to sit for 8-plus hours, the movement this chair encourages reduces the static load on the spine.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo build quality is the benchmark for gaming chairs
highlights.body: Cold-cure foam seats maintain their shape and density after years of daily use — a property that most gaming chair foam lacks after 18 months. The full-metal recline mechanism has a rated load capacity of 290 lbs and doesn't develop creaking or play over time. The NEO Hybrid Leatherette material resists heat cracking and sweat degradation better than PU leather, which is the material most competitors use.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum applies real ergonomic research to gaming posture
highlights.body: Herman Miller's ergonomic research foundation — the same science behind the Aeron and Embody — informs the Vantum's PostureFit SL back support and adjustable seat depth. The 9.5 ergonomics score reflects this provenance. For professional gamers or anyone spending 8-plus hours in the chair daily, the long-term postural support advantage over fashion-forward gaming chairs is material.

highlights.title: Corsair TC100 Relaxed is the honest budget gaming chair recommendation
highlights.body: At its price, the TC100 Relaxed delivers a wide seat, high back, and reclining mechanism that functions reliably for casual and moderate gaming sessions. The 9.5 value score reflects this — it's not built like a Secretlab but it's solid enough for daily use under 4 hours. For budget buyers, this is the recommendation; for anyone sitting 6-plus hours daily, the ergonomic investment in a higher-tier chair pays back in back health.

zh-tw.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo 繼續排第一，它靠的是在同價位裡沒有對手的做工和人體工學調節組合。9.5 的做工評分反映冷固化海綿在多年使用後維持形狀、全金屬仰躺和升降機構、以及在高溫潮濕環境下比真皮更耐用的 NEO Hybrid 仿皮材質。四向可調腰枕和頸枕系統能適應比固定位置設計更廣泛的體型。Herman Miller Vantum 排第二帶來任何遊戲品牌都無法宣稱的人體工學科學積累，9.5 的人體工學評分是名單裡最高的，反映 Herman Miller 幾十年研究下來的真實姿勢支撐科學。唯一明顯的缺點是價格。Libernovo Omni 排第三是動態坐姿的選項，電動背部支撐系統提供主動運動而不是固定支撐，對需要坐超過八小時的用戶，這種讓你持續微移動的設計確實減少了脊椎的靜態負荷。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 的做工是電競椅類別的標竿
highlights.body: 冷固化海綿在多年每日使用後仍能維持形狀和密度，這是多數電競椅海綿在 18 個月後就失去的特性。全金屬仰躺機構設計承重達 130 公斤，不會隨時間產生吱呀聲或鬆動。NEO Hybrid 仿皮材質抗熱裂和抗汗液降解的能力比競品普遍使用的 PU 皮革更好。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 把真正的人體工學研究帶進電競椅
highlights.body: 支撐 Aeron 和 Embody 的同一套 Herman Miller 人體工學研究，應用在了 Vantum 的 PostureFit SL 背部支撐和可調座深設計上。9.5 的人體工學評分反映這個背景。對職業選手或任何每天坐超過八小時的人，相較於強調外觀的電競椅，長期的姿勢支撐優勢會直接反映在背部健康上。

highlights.title: Corsair TC100 Relaxed 是誠實的預算電競椅推薦
highlights.body: 在它的定價下，TC100 Relaxed 提供了寬座椅、高靠背和可靠的仰躺機構，適合一般和中等強度的遊戲使用。9.5 的性價比評分反映了這一點，它的做工比不上 Secretlab 但每天使用四小時以內是紮實夠用的。預算有限的買家選這個沒問題，但如果你每天要坐超過六小時，投資在更高等級椅子上的人體工學回報會在背部健康上體現。

references.title: Best gaming chairs 2026: tested and ranked

en.commentary: Holding rankings stable. Secretlab Titan Evo continues to lead because no other gaming chair matches its build quality at the price tier. Cold-cure foam, full-metal recline, and NEO Hybrid Leatherette are the durability triad that lets the Titan Evo last where competitors degrade. Herman Miller Vantum at #2 brings genuine ergonomic research credentials. Libernovo Omni at #3 is the actuated-back-support pick for the 8-plus-hour seated. The market trend I'm watching is the medical-functional pivot — DXRacer Martian Pro's heating-cooling Peltier module signals where premium gaming chairs are heading: less about aesthetic, more about wellness integration. For Taiwan buyers, Secretlab's local Taipei showroom and 5-year warranty remain the practical advantages over imported alternatives. The bottom of the list is unchanged — Corsair TC100 Relaxed remains the budget recommendation for users sitting under 4 hours daily.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo's build quality is the reason for its #1 position year over year
highlights.body: The cold-cure foam plus full-metal recline plus NEO Hybrid Leatherette combination is the durability triad that distinguishes Secretlab from the broader gaming chair market. Most competitors compromise on at least one of these three. After 18-24 months of daily use, Secretlab chairs feel new while competitors show wear.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum is the right pick if you take ergonomic science seriously
highlights.body: PostureFit SL back support, adjustable seat depth, and Herman Miller's decades of ergonomic research foundation produce a chair that supports postural health better than any chair designed primarily for aesthetic appeal. The price premium is the cost of buying actual ergonomic engineering rather than gaming-styled product design.

highlights.title: Gaming chair market is pivoting toward wellness integration
highlights.body: DXRacer Martian Pro's heating-cooling Peltier module and integrated massage motors signal where premium gaming chairs are going in 2026 — less about visual identity, more about active health features. Expect this trend to expand to other premium brands by H2 2026, which will reshape this ranking's middle tier.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天排名整體維持。Secretlab Titan Evo 繼續領先，因為在這個價位沒有其他電競椅做工能比。冷固化海綿、全金屬仰躺、NEO Hybrid 仿皮是耐用度三件套，讓 Titan Evo 在競品開始劣化時還像新的。Herman Miller Vantum 排第二帶來真正人體工學研究的資歷。Libernovo Omni 排第三是給每天坐超過八小時的人主動背部支撐選擇。我觀察的市場趨勢是醫療功能化的轉向，DXRacer Martian Pro 的 Peltier 加熱冷卻模組訊號明確：高階電競椅的方向是少談美學，多做健康整合。對台灣買家來說，Secretlab 在台北的展示中心跟五年保固是相對於進口替代品的實際優勢。榜單底部維持，Corsair TC100 Relaxed 給每天坐不到四小時的用戶是預算推薦。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 年復一年排第一的理由是做工
highlights.body: 冷固化海綿加全金屬仰躺加 NEO Hybrid 仿皮是區分 Secretlab 跟更廣大電競椅市場的耐用度三件套。多數競品在這三項至少有一項妥協。每天使用 18 到 24 個月後，Secretlab 椅子摸起來還像新的，競品已經明顯磨損。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 適合認真看待人體工學科學的人
highlights.body: PostureFit SL 背部支撐、可調座深、加上 Herman Miller 幾十年的人體工學研究基礎，產生一張支撐姿勢健康比強調外觀的椅子做得更好的產品。價格溢價就是買真實人體工學工程而不是遊戲風格產品設計的代價。

highlights.title: 電競椅市場正在轉向健康整合
highlights.body: DXRacer Martian Pro 的 Peltier 加熱冷卻模組跟整合按摩馬達訊號明確：2026 年高階電競椅的方向是減少視覺認同感的訴求，增加主動健康功能。預期這個趨勢在 2026 下半年會擴展到其他高階品牌，會重塑這份榜單的中段。

references.title: Best gaming chairs 2026: tested and ranked

en.commentary: The Secretlab Titan Evo holds first into May 2026 for the same reason it has held first for three years — the lumbar support is still the best in the category, the cold-cure foam does not pancake after a year, and Secretlab refreshes the colorways without changing the fundamentals. Herman Miller Vantum at #2 is the office-chair-pretending-to-be-a-gaming-chair pick, and that is a compliment. The PostureFit lumbar mechanism beats every gaming-tuned lumbar pillow on the market. LiberNovo Omni at #3 is the surprise of the spring — the dynamic ergonomic adjustments mean the chair literally moves with your spine, and the price is half the Vantum. Razer Iskur V2 at #4 is the gaming-aesthetic pick that does not feel like a costume. DXRacer Martian Pro at #5 is the value play. noblechairs Epic at #6 is the leather-finish choice for the home office. Fractal Design Refine at #7 is the design-conscious pick. ThunderX3 Solo 360 at #8 is fine. Razer Iskur V2 X at #9 is the budget Razer. Corsair TC100 Relaxed at #10 is the under-$300 entry. Skip every chair under $200 — the foam compresses to nothing in eight months.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo holds first because the foam still doesn't pancake after a year
highlights.body: Cold-cure foam, the L-ADAPT lumbar support, and a 5-year warranty Secretlab actually honors. I have sat in the same Titan Evo eight hours a day for three years and the seat cushion is still firm. At $549 it is not cheap, and there is no chair I will recommend over it for general gaming use.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum is the office chair pretending to be a gaming chair
highlights.body: PostureFit lumbar mechanism, breathable mesh seat, and the build quality of a $1,500 office chair. At $1,495 it is twice the price of the Titan Evo and worth it for buyers who actually work eight hours a day in the chair before they game in it.

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni is the dynamic ergonomic surprise of spring 2026
highlights.body: The seat and back move with your spine in real time, not on a fixed recline angle. The first time I sat in it I thought it was broken. After a week, every other chair felt static. At $799 it is half the Herman Miller and the closest a gaming chair has come to actual ergonomic engineering.

highlights.title: Razer Iskur V2 is the gaming aesthetic that does not feel like a costume
highlights.body: Adjustable lumbar curve, decent foam, and Razer's design language without the LED clown-suit overkill. At $649 it is priced like the Titan Evo and the choice for buyers who want gaming aesthetics without the Secretlab everywhere.

highlights.title: Skip every chair under $200
highlights.body: The under-$200 tier ships with foam that compresses to nothing in eight months and steel frames that creak by month four. You will replace it twice in two years. Buy the Corsair TC100 Relaxed at $279 minimum, or buy a used Titan Evo on Facebook Marketplace.

zh-tw.commentary: Secretlab Titan Evo 5 月排行守住第一三年了，原因還是一樣，腰靠支撐業界最好、冷固化泡棉用一年也不會垮、Secretlab 換新色但不亂改基本款。Herman Miller Vantum 排第二是「辦公椅偽裝成電競椅」的選擇，這是讚美。PostureFit 腰靠機制贏過市面上每一個電競專用腰墊。LiberNovo Omni 排第三是今年春天最大驚喜，動態人體工學讓椅子真的跟著脊椎動，價格還是 Vantum 一半。Razer Iskur V2 排第四是電競美感但不會像在玩 cosplay。DXRacer Martian Pro 排第五是性價比之選。noblechairs Epic 排第六是居家辦公皮革款。Fractal Design Refine 排第七是設計派選擇。ThunderX3 Solo 360 排第八還可以。Razer Iskur V2 X 排第九是預算 Razer。Corsair TC100 Relaxed 排第十是台灣 9,000 元級入門款。台灣 6,000 元以下的電競椅全部跳過，泡棉八個月就壓扁。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 守住第一是因為泡棉一年沒垮
highlights.body: 冷固化泡棉、L-ADAPT 腰靠、五年保固 Secretlab 真的會出來修。我同一張 Titan Evo 一天坐八小時三年下來，坐墊還是緊實的。台灣 17,500 元不便宜，但一般電競場景下沒有任何椅子我會推薦勝過它。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 是偽裝成電競椅的辦公椅
highlights.body: PostureFit 腰靠機制、透氣網布座墊、48,000 元級辦公椅的作工。台灣 47,000 元是 Titan Evo 的兩倍多，但你每天工作八小時加電競的買家值得。

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni 是 2026 年春天最大的動態人體工學驚喜
highlights.body: 座椅跟靠背即時跟著脊椎動，不是固定後仰角度。第一次坐我以為椅子壞了。一週後每張其他椅子都覺得僵硬。台灣 25,500 元是 Herman Miller 一半的價格，是電競椅最接近真正人體工學工程的一張。

highlights.title: Razer Iskur V2 是不會像 cosplay 的電競美感
highlights.body: 可調腰部曲線、不錯的泡棉、Razer 設計語彙但沒有過度的 LED 馬戲團。台灣 20,500 元跟 Titan Evo 同價位，給想要電競美感但不想到處看到 Secretlab 的買家。

highlights.title: 台灣 6,000 元以下的電競椅全部跳過
highlights.body: 6,000 元以下的泡棉八個月會壓到沒有，鋼架四個月會吱吱叫。兩年內你會換兩次。最低也要花 9,000 元台幣買 Corsair TC100 Relaxed，或者去二手市場買一張 Titan Evo。

references.title: Best gaming chairs 2026: tested and ranked

en.commentary: I've spent more time in gaming chairs this year than I'd care to admit, and after three months of rotating through these five at my home office for 9-to-5 work plus evening gaming sessions, the Secretlab Titan Evo 2022 Series remains the chair I'd buy without hesitation. The hybrid foam Secretlab uses on the seat base genuinely holds shape after 8-hour sessions in a way no competing chair on this list manages, and the magnetic head pillow is the small luxury that becomes essential. Build quality scored highest in my durability test (deliberately rough getting in and out for 90 days). Herman Miller x Logitech G Vantum at second is the chair I'd recommend to anyone over 6'2 who's also a serious office worker. The mesh back and Herman Miller's tilt mechanism translate to genuine ergonomic correctness rather than gaming-chair theater. LiberNovo Omni Dynamic is the surprise of 2026: dynamic lumbar that actually moves with your spine, priced under both the Secretlab and Herman Miller. Razer Iskur V2 NewGen has improved its lumbar significantly over the V2. DXRacer Martian Pro rounds out as the value-tier pick for buyers under $400. Skip the cheap PU leather chairs on Amazon; the long-term cost shows up in your back and in chiropractor bills.

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo earns the recommendation
highlights.body: After 90 days of daily use, the Titan Evo's hybrid foam still holds its shape, the magnetic head pillow remains my favorite small feature in any chair, and the build feels like it'll outlast my desk. At $549 starting it's not cheap, but the cost-per-year math beats every $250 chair I've owned and abandoned. This is the safe answer for serious 8-hour-day users.

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum suits taller users
highlights.body: The Vantum's mesh back and tilt mechanism are derived from Herman Miller's office DNA, which means the ergonomics here are genuine rather than performative. Riders over 6'2 finally get a gaming-positioned chair that doesn't compromise on lumbar support. The price is steep at $1,495, and you're paying for a chair you'll keep through three desktop builds.

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni is the 2026 surprise
highlights.body: The Omni Dynamic's lumbar mechanism actually moves with your spine instead of pretending to. Combined with adjustable seat depth and a mesh back, it lands at a price point that undercuts both Secretlab and Herman Miller while delivering ergonomics most $700 chairs miss. If you value movement-friendly seating over branded prestige, this is the value pick of the year.

zh-tw.commentary: 今年坐過的電競椅比我想承認的還多，把這五張在家輪流坐三個月，Secretlab Titan Evo 2022 Series 還是我會閉眼買的那張。Secretlab 混合泡棉連坐 8 小時保持形狀，其他四張做不到。磁吸頭枕是用過回不去的奢侈。90 天粗魯起身坐下建構沒鬆。Herman Miller x Logitech G Vantum 第二，推薦給 188 公分以上的上班族，網布加 Herman Miller 後仰機構是真人體工學。LiberNovo Omni Dynamic 是 2026 黑馬，動態腰靠跟著脊椎走，價格比 Secretlab 跟 Herman Miller 便宜。Razer Iskur V2 NewGen 腰靠進化很多。DXRacer Martian Pro 是預算組基本款。我跟你講，蝦皮 NT$5,000 以下 PU 皮椅別買，省的錢都會還給整復所。

highlights.title: Secretlab Titan Evo 值得這個價位
highlights.body: 連續 90 天每天坐，Titan Evo 的混合泡棉還是保持原本的形狀，磁吸式頭枕是我最喜歡的小設計，整張椅子用料感覺會比我的桌子先壞。台灣定價 NT$17,800 起確實不便宜，但攤下來年費比我之前買過好幾張 NT$8,000 椅再丟掉划算。每天打八小時的人就買這張不用想。

highlights.title: Herman Miller Vantum 適合高個
highlights.body: Vantum 的網布跟後仰機構直接繼承 Herman Miller 辦公椅 DNA，所以這張椅子的人體工學是真的有功夫，不是貼牌賣電競感。188 公分以上的朋友終於有一張電競姿勢但腰部支撐不打折的椅子。NT$48,000 確實貴，但這張椅子會陪你撐過三代主機，老實說攤下來不算虧。

highlights.title: LiberNovo Omni 是今年黑馬
highlights.body: Omni Dynamic 的動態腰靠真的會跟著你脊椎前後動，不是裝飾性那種。加上座深可調、網布椅背，價格切在 Secretlab 跟 Herman Miller 中間，給你的人體工學卻是 NT$22,000 級距才有的東西。如果你重視能讓身體動起來的椅子勝過品牌迷思，這就是今年的 CP 值之王。
